agendaShareError: The event could not be added to the agenda "%agenda%". Please retry in a moment.
agendaShareToControl: The event was added to the agenda "%agenda%". It is currently in moderation
agendaSharePublished: Then event was successfully published on the agenda "%agenda%"
agendaShareRemoveUnauthorized: You do not have the required credentials to remove this event from the agenda "%agenda%"
agendaShareRemoveError: The event could not be removed from the agenda "%agenda%". Please retry in a moment
agendaShareRemoved: The event was successully removed from the agenda "%agenda%".
eventEmailSend: The event is being sent to %count% emails
